MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR:Leticia Perez, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo,
Appearances:
Kevin H. Rose, Esq. for Plaintiff Harmon M. Shragge Jr., was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Harmon M. Shragge Jr. and against the defendant Plath and Company, Inc.
Damages of $232,829.00
Costs of $276.70
For the total of $233,105.70
Plaintiff to dismiss other defendants.
Judgment signed in open court.
